title: Therapist note - sensory regulation plan
chunk_text: Aarav becomes overwhelmed during transitions, crowded outings, and noisy environments. Helpful interventions include offering a favorite toy, moving to a quieter low-stimulation area, using short calm phrases, and deep pressure input only if he seeks it. Avoid too many questions during escalation. Keeping transitions predictable and offering one calm choice at a time can reduce overload.
